title: Deep Learning Approaches for Medical Image Segmentation: A Comparative Study
abstract: A comprehensive review of state-of-the-art deep learning techniques for medical image segmentation with focus on U-Net variants and attention mechanisms.

title: Hybrid Intelligence Systems: Integrating Symbolic AI with Deep Neural Networks
authors: MD Foysal Ahmed, Zhang Wei, et al.
abstract: Novel approach combining symbolic reasoning with deep learning for improved interpretability and performance in visual recognition tasks.

title: Real-time Object Detection using Optimized YOLO Architecture for Edge Devices
conference: IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Efficient object detection framework optimized for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices with minimal latency.

title: Transfer Learning Strategies for Domain-Specific Medical Image Analysis
abstract: Comprehensive study of transfer learning techniques tailored for medical imaging applications with limited training data.

title: Vision Transformers for Medical Image Analysis: Benefits and Challenges
authors: MD Foysal Ahmed, Wang Liu, et al.
conference: Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention (MICCAI)
abstract: In-depth analysis of Vision Transformer architectures applied to medical imaging with discussion of computational challenges.

title: Attention Mechanisms in Convolutional Neural Networks: A Survey
abstract: Comprehensive survey of attention mechanisms and their applications in improving CNN performance for visual recognition tasks.

title: Automated Machine Learning for Computer Vision: Current Trends and Future Directions
abstract: Review of AutoML techniques for automated neural architecture design and hyperparameter optimization in computer vision.

title: Explainability in Deep Learning Models for Medical Image Diagnosis
abstract: Methods for improving interpretability of deep learning models in clinical settings through attention visualization and saliency maps.
